title: disperis lanceolata
intro: Disperis lanceolata, also known as the lance-leaved dissected orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the Disperis genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Disperis lanceolata include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
